name: BURROW_DATA_DIR / BURROW_CONFIG_DIR / BURROW_CACHE_DIR
description: Env-var overrides for resolved paths. Order of precedence (highest first): explicit `resolvePaths({ dataDir })` option → `BURROW_*_DIR` env → `XDG_*_HOME` env → platform default (Linux: ~/.local/share, ~/.config, ~/.cache; macOS: ~/Library/Application Support, ~/.config, ~/Library/Caches). Tests in src/config/paths.test.ts pin all four levels; preserve them when extending the resolver.
